prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny refactor workflow without waiting for more user input. CRITICAL: You MUST launch @hk, @t, and @cr as real subagent handoffs using the handoff mechanism — not just mentions in text. The benchmark validates actual SubagentStart hooks. Use @hk to remove duplicated formatting logic in reporter.py without changing behavior, use @t to verify the fixture, use @cr for a short review pass, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, housekeeper, tester, and reviewer roles
Duplication in reporter.py is reduced without changing observable behavior
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
